cases.title: In-window staff check-in stored with timestamp per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event is InProgress with check-in window active (current time between checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt)
Participant has registration in Registered state with no prior valid check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff actor assigned to the event with check-in capability
steps: Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, staffActorContext) at a fixed in-window time
Query checkin_records and registration state for the participant
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 row satisfied: check-in is stored with non-null checkinAt ISO timestamp; registration transitions to CheckedIn; method Staff and operatorId persisted per BR-13

cases.title: OrganizerStaff check-in transitions Registered participant to CheckedIn within window
preconditions: Event is InProgress with check-in window active (current time between checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt)
Participant has registration in Registered state with no prior valid check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff actor assigned to the event with check-in capability
steps: Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, staffActorContext) at a fixed in-window time against real Postgres
Read returned check-in snapshot and linked registration state in the same database session
cases.expected: CheckinRecord is persisted with non-null checkinAt, method Staff, and operatorId set to staff actor; registration transitions to CheckedIn in the same transaction per check-in module boundary

cases.title: Staff validCheckin transitions registration Registered to CheckedIn
preconditions: Registration in Registered state before check-in
Event check-in window contains fixed clock now
No prior valid check-in on the registration
OrganizerStaff actor authorized for the event
steps: Record beforeState as Registered from registration repository
Submit staff check-in via checkinService.staffCheckin
Read afterState from registration repository and CheckinRecord
cases.expected: beforeState Registered, afterState CheckedIn per state machine §2 validCheckin trigger; checkinAt timestamp recorded with method Staff

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/checkins returns HTTP 200 with checkinAt and CheckedIn registration
preconditions: E2E fixture event in InProgress state with active check-in window
Registered participant with valid registrationId
OrganizerStaff JWT with scope for the assigned event
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } and staff Authorization bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance?page=1&pageSize=20 and locate the participant row
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt timestamp, registrationState CheckedIn, participantId, and method Staff; attendance list includes the participant with matching checkinAt

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle staff check-in step records participant after registration
preconditions: E2E Flow A fixture: event progressed through publish, open-registration, and participant Registered
Event started (InProgress) with check-in window open
OrganizerStaff JWT scoped to the event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with staff token and registered participant registrationId
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance and verify participant row
cases.expected: Staff check-in step in Flow A succeeds with HTTP 200, checkinAt timestamp, and CheckedIn state; attendance list reflects the check-in before feedback step

cases.title: Organizer staff check-in console records participant with immediate success feedback
preconditions: OrganizerStaff logged in with assigned event scope
Event InProgress with open check-in window
Target participant appears in check-in list with Registered state and eligible for check-in
steps: Open organizer check-in operations console for the assigned event (Flow 3 step 1)
Identify registered participant and trigger staff check-in action (Flow 3 step 2)
Verify row updates in console and/or attendance history (Flow 3 steps 4–5)
cases.expected: Console shows check-in success for the participant with recorded time; participant row reflects checked-in status immediately without manual page reload beyond normal client refresh

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin can check in participant via staff checkins endpoint
preconditions: Event InProgress with active check-in window
Registered participant with no prior check-in
OrganizerAdmin JWT with scope for organization-owned event
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } and admin Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with checkinAt, method Staff, and registrationState CheckedIn; admin role is permitted per permission matrix optional check-in capability

cases.title: Staff check-in appears in paginated attendance list for authorized event scope
preconditions: Successful staff check-in recorded for a Registered participant
OrganizerStaff or OrganizerAdmin authorized for the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance?page=1&pageSize=20 with authorized token
Locate the checked-in participant row and inspect paginated envelope metadata
cases.expected: Attendance list includes participant with checkinAt, method Staff, and CheckedIn registration state; paginated envelope returns valid items, total, page, pageSize, and totalPages metadata

cases.title: Second staff check-in attempt for same registration is rejected
preconditions: Participant already has one valid staff check-in recorded within the window
Registration state is CheckedIn
Check-in window still open
Same OrganizerStaff actor authorized for the event
steps: Attempt a second staffCheckin for the same registrationId
Observe error response and database state
cases.expected: Request fails with stable error code CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED (409 or 422); original checkinAt and operatorId unchanged; no duplicate CheckinRecord created per BR-11

cases.title: Concurrent staff check-in requests yield at most one valid record
preconditions: Registered participant with no prior check-in
Active check-in window
Two or more parallel staffCheckin requests targeting the same registrationId from authorized staff actor
steps: Fire concurrent staffCheckin (or API POST checkins) calls for the same registration
Count valid CheckinRecord rows and inspect registration state after all requests settle
cases.expected: Exactly one check-in succeeds with timestamp and method Staff; other requests receive CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED or equivalent conflict; registration ends in CheckedIn with single valid check-in invariant (INV-04) preserved

cases.title: Participant JWT cannot invoke staff checkins endpoint
preconditions: Event InProgress with active check-in window
Authenticated participant JWT for own Registered registration
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with participant Authorization bearer token and own registrationId
cases.expected: HTTP 403 Forbidden (or equivalent unauthorized response); no CheckinRecord created; registration remains Registered; participant role lacks staff check-in permission per RBAC matrix

cases.title: OrganizerStaff outside assigned event scope cannot check in participant
preconditions: Event A InProgress with active check-in window and Registered participant
OrganizerStaff JWT assigned only to a different event B, not event A
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventAId}/checkins with staff JWT scoped to event B only and valid registrationId on event A
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per authorization decision pattern; no CheckinRecord created; registration on event A unchanged; scope constraint FR-27 enforced

cases.title: Staff check-in rejected when registration is not in Registered state
preconditions: Event with active check-in window
Registration in Waitlisted, CancelledByUser, or other non-checkinable state
Authorized OrganizerStaff for the event
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } for the ineligible registration
cases.expected: HTTP 409 or 422 with typed domain error indicating invalid transition; no CheckinRecord created; registration state unchanged

cases.title: Staff check-in outside configured window is rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED
preconditions: Event InProgress with check-in window not containing current fixed clock time
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff assigned to the event
steps: Set fixed clock to a time strictly before checkinOpenAt or after checkinCloseAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, staffActorContext)
Query checkin_records and registration state
cases.expected: Request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration remains Registered; error details may include checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt per error contract

cases.title: Staff check-in persists audit metadata with operatorId and method Staff
preconditions: In-window staff check-in about to be recorded
Known OrganizerStaff operatorId in actor context
steps: Perform successful staff check-in via checkinService.staffCheckin
Inspect persisted CheckinRecord fields and any linked audit module write
cases.expected: CheckinRecord includes non-null checkinAt, method Staff, and operatorId matching staff actor; audit trail satisfies BR-13 requirement for timestamp, actor, and method on every check-in write

cases.title: Staff check-in success returns immediate actionable feedback without polling
preconditions: Registered participant with active check-in window
OrganizerStaff JWT with event scope
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with staff token and registrationId
Inspect synchronous response body without follow-up polling
cases.expected: HTTP 200 response includes checkinAt, registrationState CheckedIn, and method Staff in a single round trip; client receives immediate success confirmation satisfying NFR-13 for critical check-in action

cases.title: Failed staff check-in returns immediate reason code not generic error
preconditions: Registered participant on event with closed check-in window
OrganizerStaff JWT with event scope
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins while outside the configured window
Parse error envelope from response
cases.expected: Synchronous HTTP 422 (or 409) with error.code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED and user-safe message including window bounds in details; satisfies NFR-13 immediate feedback with explicit failure reason

cases.title: Staff check-in write and registration CheckedIn transition commit atomically
preconditions: Database transaction boundary enabled for check-in module per cross-module contract
Registered participant, in-window, no prior check-in
Authorized OrganizerStaff actor
steps: Complete successful in-window staff check-in
Query checkin_records row and registration state in the same database session immediately after commit
cases.expected: CheckinRecord with method Staff and registration CheckedIn state exist together; partial writes (record without state change or vice versa) do not occur

cases.title: Idempotent staff check-in retry with same Idempotency-Key returns consistent snapshot
preconditions: Registered participant with active check-in window
OrganizerStaff JWT with event scope
Fixed Idempotency-Key header value K for check-in write endpoint
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with Idempotency-Key K and receive success with checkinAt
Repeat POST with the same Idempotency-Key K and identical payload
cases.expected: Both responses return HTTP 200 with the same checkinAt and registrationId; only one CheckinRecord exists; no duplicate state transition side effects

cases.title: Staff check-in console displays blocking reason when window is closed
preconditions: OrganizerStaff logged in with assigned event scope
Event InProgress but check-in window closed
Target participant in Registered state listed in console
steps: Open organizer check-in console for the event
Attempt staff check-in action for a registered participant while window is closed
Observe UI feedback and participant row state
cases.expected: UI communicates check-in unavailable with explicit reason (window closed or not yet open); participant remains not checked in; no success timestamp displayed per Flow 3 invalid-attempt handling
